lines.english: Lesson 11
lines.chinese: 第11课
lines.raw: Lesson 11 | 第11课

lines.english: Not guilty
lines.chinese: 无罪
lines.raw: Not guilty | 无罪

lines.english: What was the Customs Officer looking for?
lines.chinese: 海关官员在找什么？
lines.raw: What was the Customs Officer looking for? | 海关官员在找什么？

lines.english: Customs Officers are quite tolerant these days, but they can still stop you when you are going through the Green Channel and have nothing to declare.
lines.chinese: 如今海关官员相当宽容，但当你走绿色通道并且没有东西要申报时，他们仍然可以拦住你。
lines.raw: Customs Officers are quite tolerant these days, but they can still stop you when you are going through the Green Channel and have nothing to declare. | 如今海关官员相当宽容，但当你走绿色通道并且没有东西要申报时，他们仍然可以拦住你。

lines.english: Even really honest people are often made to feel guilty.
lines.chinese: 即使是非常诚实的人也常常会感到内疚。
lines.raw: Even really honest people are often made to feel guilty. | 即使是非常诚实的人也常常会感到内疚。

lines.english: The hardened professional smuggler, on the other hand, is never troubled by such feelings,
lines.chinese: 另一方面，那些老练的职业走私犯从不会被这种感觉所困扰，
lines.raw: The hardened professional smuggler, on the other hand, is never troubled by such feelings, | 另一方面，那些老练的职业走私犯从不会被这种感觉所困扰，

lines.english: even if he has five hundred gold watches hidden in his suitcase.
lines.chinese: 即使他的手提箱里藏着五百块金表。
lines.raw: even if he has five hundred gold watches hidden in his suitcase. | 即使他的手提箱里藏着五百块金表。

lines.english: When I returned from abroad recently, a particularly officious young Customs Officer
lines.chinese: 最近我从国外回来时，一位特别爱管闲事的年轻海关官员
lines.raw: When I returned from abroad recently, a particularly officious young Customs Officer | 最近我从国外回来时，一位特别爱管闲事的年轻海关官员

lines.english: clearly regarded me as a smuggler.
lines.chinese: 显然把我当成了走私犯。
lines.raw: clearly regarded me as a smuggler. | 显然把我当成了走私犯。

lines.english: 'Have you anything to declare?' he asked, looking me in the eye.
lines.chinese: “你有什么要申报的吗？”他直视着我的眼睛问道。
lines.raw: 'Have you anything to declare?' he asked, looking me in the eye. | “你有什么要申报的吗？”他直视着我的眼睛问道。

lines.english: 'No,' I answered confidently.
lines.chinese: “没有，”我自信地回答道。
lines.raw: 'No,' I answered confidently. | “没有，”我自信地回答道。

lines.english: 'Would you mind unlocking this suitcase please? '
lines.chinese: “请您打开这个手提箱好吗？”
lines.raw: 'Would you mind unlocking this suitcase please? ' | “请您打开这个手提箱好吗？”

lines.english: 'Not at all,' I answered.
lines.chinese: “当然可以，”我回答道。
lines.raw: 'Not at all,' I answered. | “当然可以，”我回答道。

lines.english: The Officer went through the case with great care.
lines.chinese: 那个官员非常仔细地检查了箱子。
lines.raw: The Officer went through the case with great care. | 那个官员非常仔细地检查了箱子。

lines.english: All the things I had packed so carefully were soon in a dreadful mess.
lines.chinese: 我费尽心思整理好的所有东西很快就乱七八糟了。
lines.raw: All the things I had packed so carefully were soon in a dreadful mess. | 我费尽心思整理好的所有东西很快就乱七八糟了。

lines.english: I felt sure I would never be able to close the case again.
lines.chinese: 我确信我再也无法把箱子合上了。
lines.raw: I felt sure I would never be able to close the case again. | 我确信我再也无法把箱子合上了。

lines.english: Suddenly, I saw the Officer's face light up.
lines.chinese: 突然，我看到那个官员的脸上露出了喜色。
lines.raw: Suddenly, I saw the Officer's face light up. | 突然，我看到那个官员的脸上露出了喜色。

lines.english: He had spotted a tiny bottle at the bottom of my case
lines.chinese: 他发现了一个小瓶子在我的箱子底部
lines.raw: He had spotted a tiny bottle at the bottom of my case | 他发现了一个小瓶子在我的箱子底部

lines.english: and he pounced on it with delight.
lines.chinese: 他欣喜若狂地扑了上去。
lines.raw: and he pounced on it with delight. | 他欣喜若狂地扑了上去。

lines.english: 'Perfume, eh?' he asked sarcastically.
lines.chinese: “香水，嗯？”他挖苦地问道。
lines.raw: 'Perfume, eh?' he asked sarcastically. | “香水，嗯？”他挖苦地问道。

lines.english: 'You should have declared that.
lines.chinese: “你应该申报那个。
lines.raw: 'You should have declared that. | “你应该申报那个。

lines.english: Perfume is not exempt from import duty. '
lines.chinese: 香水不免除进口关税。”
lines.raw: Perfume is not exempt from import duty. ' | 香水不免除进口关税。”

lines.english: 'But it isn't perfume, I said. 'It's hair gel. '
lines.chinese: “但它不是香水，”我说，“它是发胶。”
lines.raw: 'But it isn't perfume, I said. 'It's hair gel. ' | “但它不是香水，”我说，“它是发胶。”

lines.english: Then I added with a smile,
lines.chinese: 然后我笑着补充道，
lines.raw: Then I added with a smile, | 然后我笑着补充道，

lines.english: 'It's a strange mixture I make myself.
lines.chinese: “这是我自己调制的一种奇怪的混合物。”
lines.raw: 'It's a strange mixture I make myself. | “这是我自己调制的一种奇怪的混合物。”

lines.english: As I expected, he did not believe me.
lines.chinese: 如我所料，他没有相信我。
lines.raw: As I expected, he did not believe me. | 如我所料，他没有相信我。

lines.english: 'Try it!' I said encouragingly.
lines.chinese: “尝尝看！”我鼓励地说。
lines.raw: 'Try it!' I said encouragingly. | “尝尝看！”我鼓励地说。

lines.english: The Officer unscrewed the cap and put the bottle to his nostrils.
lines.chinese: 那个官员拧开瓶盖，把瓶子凑到鼻孔前。
lines.raw: The Officer unscrewed the cap and put the bottle to his nostrils. | 那个官员拧开瓶盖，把瓶子凑到鼻孔前。

lines.english: He was greeted by an unpleasant smell which convinced him that I was telling the truth.
lines.chinese: 一股难闻的气味扑鼻而来，这让他相信我说的是实话。
lines.raw: He was greeted by an unpleasant smell which convinced him that I was telling the truth. | 一股难闻的气味扑鼻而来，这让他相信我说的是实话。

lines.english: A few minutes later, I was able to hurry away with precious chalk marks on my baggage.
lines.chinese: 几分钟后，我带着行李上珍贵的粉笔标记，匆匆离开了。
lines.raw: A few minutes later, I was able to hurry away with precious chalk marks on my baggage. | 几分钟后，我带着行李上珍贵的粉笔标记，匆匆离开了。
